name: Real-time Updates

definitionOfDone: ActiveSprint shows current phase and progress
Live page streams events from JSONL log

dev.output: 13 files created/modified. usePolling hook, ActiveSprint component with phase indicator, AnimatedNumber with easing, heartbeat API route, live events page with JSONL tail reader.

qa.output: Smoke test: usePolling fires on interval, no memory leaks on unmount. AnimatedNumber transitions smoothly. ActiveSprint renders. Live page loads and shows empty state. PASS.
